description: Create equipment timecard entries in a bulk transaction. (Current max is set to 25 timecard entries). NOTE, this endpoint is currently in the experimental stage and is subject to change. Please contact support to be added to the beta group.

equipment_timecard_entries.description: Array of equipment timecard entries to be created

timesheet_id.description: The unique identifier of the timesheet associated with the equipment timecard entry.

wbs_code_id.description: The Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) code associated with the equipment timecard entry.

date.description: The date of the equipment timecard entry in ISO 8601 format.

equipment_id.description: The unique identifier of the equipment associated with the equipment timecard entry.

location_id.description: The unique identifier of the location associated with the equipment timecard entry.

crew_id.description: The unique identifier of the crew associated with the equipment timecard entry.

party_id.description: The unique identifier of the party associated with the equipment timecard entry.

quantity.description: The quantity of hours worked for the equipment timecard entry.

idle_quantity.description: The quantity of hours the equipment was idle for the equipment timecard entry.

unit_of_measure.description: Enum representing the unit of measure, typically 'hours'.
